ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_product_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "gene_product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene product */,
  "qualifier" TEXT /* Qualifier indicating the role of the gene product in the annotation */,
  "go_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the GO term */,
  "eco_id" TEXT /* Evidence code indicating the type of evidence supporting the annotation */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reference */,
  "with_from" TEXT /* Additional data sources or references */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Identifier for the entity that assigned the annotation */,
  "annotation_extension" TEXT /* Extensions to the annotation (if any) */,
  "go_aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the GO term (Biological Process, Molecular Function, Cellular Component) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_products" (
  "gene_product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene product */,
  "gene_product_db" TEXT /* Database where the gene product is found (e.g., UniProtKB) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the gene product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene product */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the gene product */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the gene product */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic identifier for the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic identifier for the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organism was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organism was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the GO term */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_name" TEXT /* Name of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the GO term (Biological Process, Molecular Function, Cellular Component) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent GO term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_codes" (
  "eco_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the evidence code */,
  "eco_code" TEXT /* Evidence code */,
  "eco_name" TEXT /* Name of the evidence code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evidence code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evidence code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reference */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_reviews" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id", "reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
